title: Dashboard: Automatic Transiction Graphics in TV Mode
excerpt:

posts.author: Cleber (Cleber Teixeira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Most dashboards are about the size of a TV screen.
The suggestion is to have an option for the dashboard graphics to be automatically shown in full screen on the TV as a slideshow, being able to configure the time that each graphic is on screen, when you select the TV option.
